title: Puma India Capital India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Puma India Capital India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Puma India Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Ranchi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Puma India Capital India:
Puma India Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puma India Capital India!
